step_rationale: Epicardial adipose-tissue protein; elevated in NSTEMI; local vascular inflammation and endothelial stress.
mechanism: EMPRINN elevation in epicardial adipose tissue during NSTEMI reflects adipose inflammation and endothelial dysfunction in coronary vasculature.

references.title: Restricted T-Cell Repertoire in the Epicardial Adipose Tissue of Non-ST Segment Elevation Myocardial Infarction Patients.
